languages.text: {n}Нунциус послушно лежит в ваших руках, мерно мерцая глазом и что-то кряхтя из вокса.{/n}
{n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Нунциус послушно лежит в ваших руках, мерно мерцая глазом и что-то кряхтя из вокса.{/n}

{n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}
{n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius espera dócilmente en tus manos. Su ojo produce un parpadeo constante, mientas que su voco emite un sonido similar a un gruñido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius espera dócilmente en tus manos. Su ojo produce un parpadeo constante, mientas que su voco emite un sonido similar a un gruñido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯温顺地待在你手上。他的眼睛不断闪烁，音阵里传来噼啪的杂音。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯温顺地待在你手上。他的眼睛不断闪烁，音阵里传来噼啪的杂音。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius reste docilement dans vos mains. Des clignotements réguliers illuminent ses yeux, tandis qu'un son semblable à un grognement émane du vox.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius reste docilement dans vos mains. Des clignotements réguliers illuminent ses yeux, tandis qu'un son semblable à un grognement émane du vox.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, ellerinde uysalca duruyor. Gözü sürekli titreme üretirken vokstan homurdanmaya benzer bir cızırtı geliyor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, ellerinde uysalca duruyor. Gözü sürekli titreme üretirken vokstan homurdanmaya benzer bir cızırtı geliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius ruht fügsam in deinen Händen. Während sein Auge kontinuierlich zuckt, ertönt aus dem Vox ein knurrendes Geräusch.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンシウスはあなたの手の中でおとなしく座っている。彼の目は絶えずチカチカと光り、呻くような音がヴォックスからひびく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}
